---
title: "Contact"
---

- Email: [eva.petitdemange@mines-albi.fr](mailto:eva.petitdemange@mines-albi.fr)
- ORCID: [0000-0003-3200-0446](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3200-0446)
- Google Scholar: [E7YynH0AAAAJ](https://scholar.google.fr/citations?user=E7YynH0AAAAJ)
- IdHAL: [eva-petitdemange](https://cv.hal.science/eva-petitdemange)
- IdRef: [25432813X](https://www.idref.fr/25432813X)
- ResearcherID: [BBD-4668-2021](http://www.researcherid.com/rid/BBD-4668-2021)
- LinkedIn: [REPLACE](https://www.linkedin.com/REPLACE) <!-- PLACEHOLDER, not on your HAL page, remove this line if not wanted -->
- CGI / IMT Mines Albi: [REPLACE](https://www.imt-mines-albi.fr/REPLACE) <!-- PLACEHOLDER -->
